name: signal
description: Signal connector using signal-cli REST API — bridges Signal messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: signal_cli_url
config_fields.description: URL of the signal-cli REST API (e.g. http://localhost:8080)

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Signal group IDs to process messages from
